title: Will Enovix's (ENVX) AI-1 Battery Test Results Redefine Its Smartphone Growth Narrative?
text: Independent testing measured Enovix's AI-1 smartphone battery at 935 Wh/L volumetric energy density, validated as having the highest energy density of any commercially available smartphone battery. This represents a significant validation of Enovix's silicon-anode technology. The AI-1 platform is Enovix's flagship 100% silicon anode platform targeted at smartphones and smart eyewear markets where volumetric energy density is a key requirement. Enovix reached an updated smartphone qualification framework with Honor, paving the way for a targeted deployment in the second half of 2026 and a broader launch in 2027. Nine of 12 analysts covering the stock rate it a buy, with a consensus price target of $14.45.
